glosses.yue: 無論邊個; 凡是…嘅人
glosses.pt: quem quer que; qualquer pessoa que
glosses.ja: 誰であれ; 〜する人なら誰でも

sentences.target: Quiconque arrive en retard attend dehors.

translations.fr: Quiconque arrive en retard attend dehors.
translations.en: Anyone who arrives late waits outside.
translations.de: Wer zu spät kommt, wartet draußen.
translations.it: Chi arriva in ritardo aspetta fuori.
translations.pt: Quem chega atrasado espera do lado de fora.
translations.vi: Ai đến muộn thì chờ bên ngoài.
translations.nl: Wie te laat komt, wacht buiten.
translations.hi: जो देर से आता है वह बाहर इंतज़ार करता है.
translations.pl: Kto się spóźnia, czeka na zewnątrz.
translations.nb: Den som kommer for sent, venter utenfor.
translations.id: Siapa yang datang terlambat menunggu di luar.
translations.sv: Den som kommer sent väntar utanför.
translations.da: Den, der kommer for sent, venter udenfor.
translations.fi: Se, joka tulee myöhässä, odottaa ulkona.
translations.ja: 遅れて来た人は外で待ちます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite relative pronoun meaning 'whoever'; subject of 'arrive'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Preposition; part of the fixed expression 'en retard' meaning 'late'.
Common noun; in the locution 'en retard' expressing the state of being late.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Adverb indicating location.

sentences.target: Quiconque a faim peut se servir.

translations.fr: Quiconque a faim peut se servir.
translations.en: Anyone who's hungry can help themselves.
translations.de: Wer Hunger hat, kann sich bedienen.
translations.yue: 肚餓嘅人可以自己攞嚟食。
translations.pt: Quem estiver com fome pode se servir.
translations.ar: من كان جائعًا يمكنه أن يأخذ لنفسه.
translations.nl: Wie honger heeft, kan sich bedienen.
translations.hi: जिसे भूख लगी है वह खुद ले सकता है.
translations.pl: Kto jest głodny, może się częstować.
translations.el: Όποιος πεινάει μπορεί να σερβιριστεί μόνος του.
translations.nb: Den som er sulten, kan forsyne seg.
translations.sv: Den som är hungrig kan ta för sig.
translations.ro: Cine este flămând se poate servi.
translations.cs: Kdo má hlad, může si nabrat.
translations.da: Den, der er sulten, kan tage selv.
translations.fi: Se, jolla on nälkä, voi ottaa itse.
translations.ja: お腹がすいた人はご自由にどうぞ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite relative pronoun meaning 'whoever'; subject of 'a'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; 'avoir faim' expresses hunger.
Common noun; direct object of 'a' in the idiom 'avoir faim'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular, governing the infinitive.
Clitic reflexive pronoun; part of the pronominal verb 'se servir'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peut' in the pronominal construction 'se servir'.

translations.en: I tell anyone who wants to come in.
translations.de: Ich sage jedem Bescheid, der rein will.
translations.zh-Hans: 我通知任何想进来的人。
translations.yue: 我會通知所有想入嚟嘅人。
translations.ru: Я предупреждаю каждого, кто хочет войти.
translations.he: אני מודיע לכל מי שרוצה להיכנס.
translations.tr: İçeri girmek isteyen herkese haber veriyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi báo cho bất kỳ ai muốn vào.
translations.nl: Ik informeer iedereen die naar binnen wil.
translations.uk: Я попереджаю кожного, хто хоче зайти.
translations.hu: Szólok mindenkinek, aki be akar jönni.
translations.hi: जो भी अंदर आना चाहता है, उसे मैं बताता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg sier fra til alle som vil inn.
translations.id: Saya memberi tahu siapa pun yang ingin masuk.
translations.sv: Jag säger till alla som vill komma in.
translations.ro: Anunț pe oricine vrea să intre.
translations.da: Jeg giver besked til alle, der vil ind.
translations.fi: Ilmoitan kaikille, jotka haluavat tulla sisään.
translations.ja: 入りたい人には伝えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive.
Indefinite relative pronoun introducing a relative clause; direct object of 'préviens'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular, selecting the infinitive 'entrer'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'veut' within the relative clause modifying 'quiconque'.

sentences.target: Quiconque oublie sa carte reste à l'accueil.
sentences.reading: /ki.kɔ̃k u.bli sa kaʁt ʁɛst a la.kœj/

translations.fr: Quiconque oublie sa carte reste à l'accueil.
translations.ipa: /ki.kɔ̃k u.bli sa kaʁt ʁɛst a la.kœj/
translations.en: Anyone who forgets their card stays at reception.
translations.es: Quien olvida su tarjeta se queda en recepción.
translations.de: Wer seine Karte vergisst, bleibt an der Rezeption.
translations.it: Chi dimentica il badge resta alla reception.
translations.ko: 카드를 잊은 사람은 안내 데스크에 머무릅니다.
translations.yue: 唔記得帶卡嘅人要留喺前台。
translations.ru: Кто забыл пропуск, остаётся на ресепшене.
translations.pt: Quem esquecer o crachá fica na recepção.
translations.he: מי ששוכח את הכרטיס שלו נשאר בקבלה.
translations.vi: Ai quên thẻ thì ở lại lễ tân.
translations.ar: من نسي بطاقته يبقى عند الاستقبال.
translations.nl: Wie zijn pas vergeet, blijft bij de receptie.
translations.uk: Хто забуває свою картку, залишається на рецепції.
translations.hu: Aki elfelejti a kártyáját, a recepción marad.
translations.hi: जो अपना कार्ड भूल जाता है वह रिसेप्शन पर रहता है.
translations.pl: Kto zapomni kartę, zostaje na recepcji.
translations.el: Όποιος ξεχνά την κάρτα του μένει στη ρεσεψιόν.
translations.nb: Den som glemmer kortet sitt, blir i resepsjonen.
translations.id: Yang lupa kartunya tetap di resepsionis.
translations.sv: Den som glömmer sitt kort stannar i receptionen.
translations.ro: Cine își uită cardul rămâne la recepție.
translations.cs: Kdo zapomene kartu, zůstává na recepci.
translations.da: Den, der glemmer sit kort, bliver ved receptionen.
translations.fi: Se, joka unohtaa korttinsa, jää vastaanottoon.
translations.ja: カードを忘れた人は受付に残ります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite relative pronoun meaning 'whoever'; subject of 'oublie' and 'reste'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular, feminine singular agreeing with 'carte'.
Common noun; direct object of 'oublie'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article 'le' elided before a vowel-initial noun; determiner of 'accueil'.
Common noun meaning 'front desk/reception'; object of the preposition 'à'.
